zh.section_subtitle: 每张卡片对应一条长期研究主线：相图、输运、张量网络和方法学，不再只是装饰性推荐位。

cards.title: 相图控制塔 / Phase Atlas
cards.description: 高维参数空间扫描、相边界自动提取、有限尺寸与收敛误差统一打包进 atlas 报告。

cards.title: 输运总线 / Transport Bus
cards.description: 围绕 Kubo 公式构建统一 benchmark protocol，比较求解器、截断策略与缓存层收益。

cards.title: 张量栈 / Tensor Stack
cards.description: 把 DMRG、截断阈值、误差预算与自动报告连接起来，形成可回放的张量实验闭环。

cards.title: 方法铸造厂 / Method Forge
cards.description: 从 paper 到 minimal executable case 的标准流程，沉淀成长期可复用的方法模板与脚本骨架。

en.section_subtitle: Each card points to a persistent research sector: phase atlas, transport, tensor networks, and methodology.

cards.title: Phase Atlas
cards.description: Dense parameter scans, phase-boundary extraction, and finite-size / convergence diagnostics in one atlas report.

cards.title: Transport Bus
cards.description: A benchmark protocol around the Kubo formula to compare solvers, truncation rules, and cache-layer gains.

cards.title: Tensor Stack
cards.description: DMRG routines, truncation budgets, and auto-generated reports wired into a replayable tensor experiment loop.

cards.title: Method Forge
cards.description: A repeatable paper-to-code path that turns model reading into executable cases and reusable workflow templates.
